allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed $_" } catch {} }; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
